scope_note: Goal Kicker currently exports testing-policy summaries for this school. If official score distributions were not captured, the panel stays policy-only rather than inventing ranges.
policy: UC Berkeley follows the University of California first-year requirements page cited here, which lists A-G coursework and GPA requirements and does not require SAT/ACT scores on that page; this pass does not attach a Berkeley-only test-policy sentence.
